allow: Bash(awk -F',' 'NR>1 {im+=$4; ic+=$5; bm+=$6; bc+=$7; lm+=$8; lc+=$9; mm+=$11; mc+=$12} END { printf "Instrucciones cubiertas: %d/%d \(%.2f%%\)\\n", ic, ic+im, ic*100/\(ic+im\); printf "Ramas cubiertas: %d/%d \(%.2f%%\)\\n", bc, bc+bm, bc*100/\(bc+bm\); printf "Líneas cubiertas: %d/%d \(%.2f%%\)\\n", lc, lc+lm, lc*100/\(lc+lm\); printf "Métodos cubiertos: %d/%d \(%.2f%%\)\\n", mc, mc+mm, mc*100/\(mc+mm\); }' target/site/jacoco/jacoco.csv)
